task: Prevent stale branded prompt-copy wording and add LLM switch loading overlay

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, scoped commits, and deploy verification for production-facing changes.
Production changes require actual runtime verification, source-of-truth deploy flow, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Added frontend render-time normalization so stale practice_table values like 'Perplexity 입력창에 붙여넣습니다.' render as '선택한 AI 도구의 입력창에 붙여넣습니다.'.
Forced the prompt-copy practice row to use generic selected-AI wording regardless of old server state.
Added an aria-busy loading overlay with spinner and explanatory text over the Day 1 practice lab while LLM tool switching is in progress.
Disabled all LLM option buttons during the switch request to prevent overlapping changes.
